problem id: dff2a315
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  11101100 -> 00111011
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00010100 -> 00000101
  11101001 -> 01111010
  10000001 -> 01100000
  00110101 -> 01001101
  11010100 -> 00110101
  01000110 -> 10010001
  11111011 -> 11111110
  10110100 -> 00101101

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 10111110
